nl_query: What is the average number of history corrections per published result?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY r.id)) AS avg_history_corrections_per_result
FROM   result r
JOIN   result_history rh ON rh.result_id = r.id
